description: The Senior Technical Lead owns complex technical initiatives, mentors multiple teams, and ensures architecture, quality, and delivery align with business objectives.
responsibilities: Lead design and development of complex systems
Guide and mentor Technical Leads and Senior Engineers
Review architecture decisions and critical code paths
Drive engineering best practices and standards
Collaborate with product, delivery, and architecture teams
Resolve high-impact technical issues and escalations

skills.name: Deep expertise in one or more tech stacks
